german_requirement.title: Majority of Roles Do Not Require German Skills
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant share of positions remains unclassified, highlighting accessibility challenges for non-German speakers.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Dominate, Leaving Technical Roles Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between Core and Technical PM roles, highlighting an imbalance in the product management landscape.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate Workforce Composition
seniority.subtitle: With 56% of positions held by senior professionals, the market is clearly senior-heavy.

work_mode.title: Remote Work Dominates with Significant Flexibility
work_mode.subtitle: A balanced work mode reveals a strong preference for remote arrangements over hybrid and onsite options.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with remote options remaining limited.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: Nearly half of roles now demand AI responsibilities or skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Are Equally Distributed Across Categories
industry.subtitle: No single category dominates, but unclassified roles limit overall accessibility.
